title: Replay Lineage — overlay + persona-candidate cash-out (Q10 preserved)

scope.intent: Make brain_overlays_v1 influence and PersonaCandidatePacketV1 consideration visible in the Replay timeline so reviewers can reconstruct which non-quant adjustments and which candidate hypotheses were in play at decision time.
scope.anti_drift_rule: Replay remains a governance surface. Overlay ids and persona candidate ids are preserved as traceable metadata, never treated as active truth or auto-promoted.

modified_files: src/phase46/decision_trace_ledger.py (two optional list fields: brain_overlay_ids_at_decision, persona_candidate_ids_at_decision + schema doc)

src/phase47_runtime/traceability_replay.py (REPLAY_LINEAGE_OPTIONAL_FIELDS extended; list-valued lineage normalization; decision events carry overlay/persona ids; join payload and same-asset injection propagate overlay ids from TODAY_REGISTRY_SURFACE_V1; micro brief surfaces list lineage fields)

new_optional_fields: brain_overlay_ids_at_decision: list[str] — brain_overlays_v1 ids influencing the active registry entry at decision time
persona_candidate_ids_at_decision: list[str] — PersonaCandidatePacketV1 ids considered at decision time (candidate-only)

REPLAY_LINEAGE_JOIN_V1.new_field: brain_overlay_ids: list[str] — overlay ids from TODAY_REGISTRY_SURFACE_V1 for the asset's active horizon registry entry

timeline_events.normalization: list-valued lineage fields are normalized into list[str]; scalar lineage fields remain strings

coverage: decision ledger schema documents the two new optional list fields
append_decision persists both new optional list fields
timeline decision event carries both new optional list fields
lineage injection propagates brain_overlay_ids from registry_surface to same-asset events, without overwriting pre-existing decision-level lists
micro brief surfaces overlay and persona list lineage fields
Q10 contract preserved — at least one persisted snapshot still carries message_snapshot_id + registry_entry_id simultaneously

non_goals_confirmed: No active registry is mutated by the Replay surface
No overlay is promoted or demoted — only its id is displayed in lineage
No persona candidate is promoted — ids appear only where the operator explicitly passed them on append_decision
No Q10 field renames or required-field removals; the new fields are additive-only
